name: Dwarven Daisy (Lesser)
description:
Activate 1 Strike

A dwarven daisy is a string of dozens of firecrackers that create tiny, loud explosions. The string ends with a short, wrapped fuse. Pulling off the wrapping in a quick motion lights the fuse and is done as part of the action to Strike. A dwarven daisy deals the listed fire damage and splash damage. A dwarven daisy also has a chance to dazzle its target. A creature struck by a dwarven daisy must succeed at a save or become for 1 round.

The firework deals 1d6 fire damage and 1 fire splash damage. The DC is 16.
